{
  EmployeeActivator.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class EmployeeActivatorRegistration
{
    [ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register() =>
        GeneratedActivators.Register<global::Employee>(Create);

    static global::Employee Create(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object?> values)
    {
        values.TryGetValue("Email", out var arg0);
        values.TryGetValue("Address", out var arg1);
        return new global::Employee((string)arg0!, (global::Address)arg1!);
    }
},
  EmployeeRowReader.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class EmployeeRowReaderRegistration
{
    [ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register() =>
        GeneratedRowReaders.Register<global::Employee>(ReadRow);

    static global::Employee ReadRow(global::DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.Cell?[] cells, string?[]? sharedStrings, global::System.Action<int, string> onError)
    {
        return new global::Employee(global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[0], sharedStrings), (global::Address)global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadObject(cells[1], sharedStrings, typeof(global::Address), 1, onError)!);
    }
},
  EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> EmailColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Email, configuration);

    public static void EmailHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Employee, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Email);

    public static void EmailRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, FormulaContext<global::Employee>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Employee>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Email);

    public static void EmailInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Email);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> AddressColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, global::Address>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Address, configuration);

    public static void AddressHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Employee, global::Address> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Address);

    public static void AddressRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, global::Address, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, FormulaContext<global::Employee>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Employee>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Address);

    public static void AddressInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Address, value);

    public static void AddressExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Address);
}
